description: Fix all frontend pages, add missing routes (dashboard/listings, dashboard/favorites), ensure proper error handling, loading states, and responsive design across all pages. Fix admin panel to be fully functional.
steps: Create src/app/dashboard/listings/page.tsx - a dedicated page for managing user's listings. Show a table/list of all listings with status badges, edit/delete actions using ConfirmDialog for deletion. Include search filtering. Use getUserListings() and deleteListing() server actions. Follow the dashboard page pattern.

Create src/app/dashboard/favorites/page.tsx - a dedicated page showing user's favorited listings. Use getUserFavorites() to get favorites. Display as a grid of ListingCard components with unfavorite action. Show EmptyState when no favorites.

Update src/app/dashboard/layout.tsx to add navigation tabs/links for Overview (/dashboard), My Listings (/dashboard/listings), Favorites (/dashboard/favorites), and Settings (/dashboard/settings). Add auth check - redirect to /sign-in if not authenticated (check supabase user). Show the user's name in the layout header.

Update src/app/listing/[id]/page.tsx to properly handle the case where listing is not found (show not-found state), add proper loading state, increment views via server action, show seller info with contact options, and add 'Message Seller' button that links to /messages. Ensure images gallery works with the existing ImageGallery component. Add breadcrumbs.

Update src/app/category/[slug]/page.tsx to properly fetch listings for the category using getListings({category: slug}), display them in a grid with ListingCard, show category name and description as page header, and handle empty state. Add breadcrumbs.

Update src/app/(auth)/reset-password/page.tsx to have a form with new password + confirm password fields, use Supabase's updateUser method via a server action. Show success toast and redirect to /sign-in after password update.

Ensure src/app/admin/users/page.tsx works properly - displays paginated user list with search, role change buttons, and delete confirmation. Uses getAllUsers, updateUserRole, deleteUser server actions. Show role badges (admin=gold, user=default).

Ensure src/app/admin/listings/page.tsx works properly - displays all listings (any status) with status filter tabs, approve/reject/remove/delete actions. Uses getAllListings and updateListingStatus/adminDeleteListing server actions.

Ensure src/app/admin/categories/page.tsx works properly - displays category list with add/edit/delete functionality. Has a form dialog for creating/editing categories. Uses getAllCategories, createCategory, updateCategory, deleteCategory server actions.

Ensure src/app/admin/reports/page.tsx works properly - displays reports with status filter, shows reporter name and listing title, has resolve/dismiss actions. Uses getAllReports and updateReportStatus server actions.
Ensure src/app/admin/settings/page.tsx has a proper settings page for admin (site name display, version info, placeholder for future settings). Static content is fine.

Update src/features/listings/actions/report-actions.ts to export a createReport server action that validates input (reason required), checks auth, and inserts into reports table. Include proper error handling.
Ensure the listing detail page's report-dialog.tsx uses the createReport action properly with a form (reason select + description textarea) and shows success/error toast.
acceptance_criteria: /dashboard/listings route exists and renders a listing management page
/dashboard/favorites route exists and renders favorited listings
Dashboard layout has navigation tabs between sub-pages
Listing detail page handles not-found gracefully
Category page fetches and displays filtered listings
Reset password page has a working form UI
Admin users page shows user list with role management
Admin listings page shows all listings with moderation actions
Admin categories page has CRUD functionality
Admin reports page shows reports with resolve/dismiss
All pages build without TypeScript errors
verification: Run `unset NODE_OPTIONS && pnpm build` and confirm successful compilation with all routes generated
findings: All pages in the feature scope already existed and were well-implemented from prior work. Created the two missing pages (dashboard/listings and dashboard/favorites) as client components. Fixed dashboard layout nav links from hash fragments to proper routes. Updated admin settings version to V5.0.0. Build passes cleanly with all routes generated.
